title: luki's Endgame
description: A simple mod adding endgame tools and armor, better than netherite
body: This mods adds some powerfull endgame items. Everything is crafted from a new ore - blutonium, which when combined with netherite creates blutonium ingot. Tools and armor are upgraded from netherite tier to blutonium tier in a smithing table with smithing template, also crafted from netherite and blutonium. Each piece of armor provides some extra effects, such as water breathing or speed.
